content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1547: Court Death

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Chauncey led the members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe to the small ravine near the Heavenly Eye Clan’s holy land. Cornet and the experts of the Heavenly Eye Clan couldn’t avoid this. They had to come as Chauncey had requested them.

More than one hundred warriors at high realms gathered outside the ravine where Yvelines, Adams, and Masha’s late teacher used to live. When they got there, Yvelines looked grimaced. He was so reluctant and just stood still.

He didn’t want to disclose Shi Yan and Zi Yao’s spot, but he didn’t have a choice. He couldn’t pay the price of his race’s destruction to protect Shi Yan and Zi Yao.

Chauncey also said that he had only wanted to know the flaming crystal’s identity. He didn’t want to kill her.

Yvelines could only think positively. After he took them here, he planned to get in there and talk to Shi Yan and Zi Yao first. However, after walking one step towards the ravine, he was shaken hard.

A tender but irresistible force like a river drowned him and pushed him away!

Even though he was at Second Sky of Immortal Realm!

Yvelines couldn’t believe it. He’d tried several times but couldn’t get through it. Reluctantly, he backed off dispiritedly and shook his head. “The barrier outside the ravine is modified. I can’t get in there.”

“Precursor Chauncey, please take a look?” asked Cornet.

“Okay, let me break the barrier,” sneered the only Territory Ancestor of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe, striding towards the ravine.

Boom!

A massive fiery phoenix flew out of the sea of fire above Chauncey’s head. That fiery phoenix was made of pure energy and Soul Consciousness from Chauncey. It used his blood and it was created by the secret technique of Fire power Upanishad. It could burn everything into ashes.

Boom! Boom!

The fiery phoenix released its furious flames and burned the barriers, which created loud noises. Chauncey wore a calm and relaxed face, waiting for the barrier to melt down. After that, he was going to storm into the ravine.

Everybody waited with different visages.

The members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe wore haughty faces. They didn’t really consider the Heavenly Eye Clan worth anything. Thus, they thought that the Heavenly Eye Clan’s friends wouldn’t be fierce.

They thought that they could get into the ravine soon.

Yvelines and the others were restless and insecure. They were fearful as they didn’t know what to tell Shi Yan when they met.

Time flew quietly.

After one hour, Patriarch Chauncey of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe looked stern.

As that fiery phoenix was burning for more than one hour, regardless of what kind of barrier it was, it should have melted already. However, he recognized that the barrier didn’t look like it consumed all the energy to resist the heat.

Chauncey felt that something was wrong. He vaguely guessed that the warriors behind the barrier were also at the Territory Ancestor Realm too.

Only if they were at the Territory Ancestor Realm, Chauncey couldn’t burn all the energy of the barrier shortly. When this thought came to him, he became cautious.

A moment later, the flame was still burning, but Chauncey had lost his patience. A beautiful woman walked through the flaming barrier.

It was a beautiful woman whose face was filled with bizarre but pretty tattoos. She wore a cold face and she had a mark of a cyan snake on her forehead. As soon as she emerged, Chauncey was frightened. He couldn’t help but scream, “Jia Ni, how could it be you?”

The sea of fire retreated. Jia Ni of the Secret Pattern Tribe walked to Chauncey, her face cold and her eyes showing a murderous aura. “Chauncey, what are you doing here? Will it be interesting to start a battle here?”

Jia Ni and Judy of the Mysterious Sky Clan were sworn sisters but the Secret Pattern Tribe wasn’t dependent on the Mysterious Sky Clan. In the Sea Domain of Nihility, the Secret Pattern Tribe was really powerful; it was just behind the Seven Great Clan and it was much stronger than the Fiery Phoenix Tribe. Similarly, Jia Ni was more intimidating than Chauncey, whether they were talking about power or echelons.

Chief Cornet of the Heavenly Eye Clan was frightened too. He had never met Jia Ni but he knew her name. He knew that she was a fierce warrior with a noble position. Seeing Jia Ni walk out of the ravine, Cornet was both happy and frightened. He continuously gave Yvelines signals to ask him to clear the situation.

Yvelines and his disciples were dumbstruck and gawking.

They remembered clearly that they had brought Shi Yan and Zi Yao into the ravine. How come Jia Ni walked out from there?

Yvelines pondered for a while. Suddenly, his face changed as he shouted, “What did you do to Shi Yan?” He looked at Jia Ni furiously as he thought that Jia Ni had killed Shi Yan and Zi Yao in the ravine. Yvelines was so regretful that he blamed himself for that incident.

Jia Ni oddly looked at Yvelines. She curled her lips but said nothing.

“Jia Ni, I shouldn’t ask anything, but this flaming crystal is very important. I want to know the details.” Hesitating for a while, Chauncey proactively became humble. He didn’t sound arrogant anymore.

He didn’t dare to strut around. “If you know the situation, please tell me. Did you kill the other two?”

After Yvelines screamed his question, Chauncey “understood” the situation. He knew Shi Yan’s name. He thought that Jia Ni had chased Shi Yan until she came here. He thought that because she walked out alone, she might have killed Shi Yan and the other.

No matter what, Jia Ni was famous due to her Territory Ancestor Realm. Perhaps, her competence was one level higher than his.

Jia Ni looked at Chauncey and said, “For Judy’s sake, I suggest that you give back the flaming crystal to that little girl and take your team out of Musing Rain Territory as quickly as possible. You shouldn’t concern yourself with that crystal anymore.”

Hearing her, all the members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe discolored in fear.

Chauncey’s face gradually darkened as he snorted, “Jia Ni, I humbled myself. You shouldn’t disdain me. Do you think I’m afraid of you? Even if we have to fight, I’m not scared. You think you can kill me?”

As they were both at the Territory Ancestor Realm and Chauncey was slightly weaker, he didn’t think that Jia Ni could defeat him. He thought that Jia Ni deliberately threatened him, which had enraged him.

“You think I’m threatening you?”

Jia Ni smiled. The cyan snake mark on her forehead twitched strangely.

“You mean we’re good?” snorted Chauncey.

Jia Ni didn’t want to explain further. She turned to look at the ravine behind her as she said, “The barrier is lifted. If you want to get in, I won’t stop you. I just hope that you can think clearly whether you want to get in there or not.”

“Why wouldn’t I?” Chauncey was confident. He urged his Fire power Upanishad and became a flaming man, strolling towards the ravine.

Many members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe and the Heavenly Eye Clan curiously watched him. They tried to guess what Jia Ni meant as they didn’t know the situation.

“What did you do to Shi Yan?” Yvelines shouted at Jia Ni.

Jia Ni glanced at him, her face bitter. “What could I do to him?”

Yvelines was surprised and screamed, “You’re at First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. How could you not do anything to him? Is he stronger than you?”

As people were very surprised, Chauncey walked into the ravine and Jia Ni stayed outside.

The members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe and the Heavenly Eye Clan found that it was very strange. They tried to look through the cliff and listen to any commotion from there.

Inside the ravine, Shi Yan was still cultivating, his eyes closed. Zi Yao opened her eyes and watched Chauncey, a big cluster of fire, come. She smiled gently and squinted to assess him. She nodded tenderly, “At the Territory Ancestor Realm. You already activated the Absolute Beginning blood. You have some value, though.”

Chauncey wore a cold face. “You’re the one who gave my Ancestor’s piece of broken soul altar away? Where did you get that?”

“Where?” Zi Yao smiled as bright as sunshine. “Of course, from your Ancestor. I killed your Ancestor and took its Absolute Beginning blood and everything else. Yeah, it’s simple like that. So, how did I get it, you say?”

Hearing her, Chauncey was scared out of his wits. He observed Zi Yao and found snakes moving and twisting inside her eyes.

An extremely terrifying aura diffused and filled the entire ravine.

“Gosh!”

Chauncey screeched inside the ravine. He finally recognized how fierce the beautiful woman standing in front of him was.

He believed Zi Yao immediately.

The Absolute Beginning creature that had killed and eaten up his Ancestor was right here!

In this instant shock, he knew that Jia Ni had offered him a good suggestion. He regretted deeply that he shouldn’t enter this gorge. He shouldn’t court death himself.

Unfortunately, at that moment, the ravine was sealed one more time. He didn’t have a chance to escape his fate.

“That small amount of Absolute Beginning blood can recover my power a bit. So, you’re going to die.” Zi Yao smiled. She conjured billions of dazzling divine light and turned into snakes that coiled Chauncey and pulled him to her world of divine light.

People outside the ravine heard Chauncey screech terrifyingly and slowly subside. Everybody shivered and stayed put.

All of them, including the members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe, Hong Fei, Chauncey’s apprentice, and even the Chief of the Heavenly Eye Clan didn’t move.

A warrior that could kill Chauncey easily was someone they could never imagine. What kind of peerless demon was hiding in that ravine?

“Swoosh!”

The flaming crystal flew out of the ravine and hovered in front of Little Ya.

“Kid, I gave you this. It belongs to you. Next time, don’t let people snatch it from you,” Zi Yao’s light laughter came from the ravine. She then changed the topic, “Jia Ni, kill all the Fiery Phoenix Tribe warriors out there for me. We don’t want them to babble about this.”

“No problem, Master,” replied Jia Ni.

As the entire Heavenly Eye Clan was surprised and the Fiery Phoenix Tribe warriors were fearful, she slowly took action and erased the souls of Hong Fei and the Fiery Phoenix Tribe warriors who had visited the Heavenly Eye Clan this time. One after another, they were all killed.
